query:
SELECT c.id as courseId, c.code, l.id as lessonId, l.title, l.lessonOrder
FROM courses c
LEFT JOIN lessons l ON c.id = l.courseId
WHERE c.code = 'SPR101'
ORDER BY l.lessonOrder;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2KiCrCqNDFcXt7P.577d1a63eeb5 --database P2Dpw9MQsmxzdUQCfGjV6b --execute SELECT c.id as courseId, c.code, l.id as lessonId, l.title, l.lessonOrder
FROM courses c
LEFT JOIN lessons l ON c.id = l.courseId
WHERE c.code = 'SPR101'
ORDER BY l.lessonOrder;
